message:
feat(dashboard): task history page — one task across all runs

- Add #/tasks/{name}/history route (before task detail to avoid conflicts)
- Implement renderTaskHistory() showing per-run results table
- Add "View history across runs" link in task detail subtitle
- Add .history-link CSS styles
